basic_details.job_title: Morbi District Collector Office District Project Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Morbi District Collector Office has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 District Project Officer Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 25-07-2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years as on 10-06-2026. Age relaxation rules will be applicable as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Master of Social Work (MSW) with minimum 70% or equivalent grade, Computer knowledge, Degree/Diploma/Certificate course in Disaster Management desirable
qualification.details: Master of Social Work (MSW) with a minimum of 70% or equivalent grade. Computer knowledge is mandatory. A Degree/Diploma/Certificate course in Disaster Management is desirable.

salary_details.details: The selected candidates will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 20,000 to Rs. 25,000 per month.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website:morbi.nic.in/ .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website:morbi.nic.in/ . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Morbi District Collector Office District Project Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Morbi District Collector Office recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the District Project Officer post is 25th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the office before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the District Project Officer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master of Social Work (MSW) with a minimum of 70% or equivalent grade, along with computer knowledge. A degree or diploma in Disaster Management is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 35 years as of 10th June 2026. Age relaxation will be provided as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the District Project Officer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary in the range of Rs. 20,000 to Rs. 25,000.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the Morbi District Collector Office District Project Officer job?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The job is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number is 03/2026 (Second Attempt).

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: You can find the links to the official notification and application form in the "Important Links" section of this article.
